home.availability: Open to product challenges, consulting, and focused design reviews
home.bio.prefix: Dmitrii Gareev is a Product Designer at
home.bio.suffix: Yandex Infrastructure. I design complex B2B and AI interfaces so teams can make decisions faster, ship features, and scale products without creating chaos.
home.subtitle: I connect research, product strategy, design systems, and fast prototypes. I am especially useful for teams with deep technical complexity: developer tools, internal platforms, AI workflows, and infrastructure products.
home.actions.label: Primary actions
home.hero.cardTitle: Design that turns complexity into clear growth
home.hero.cardText: I help find the value, shape the user journey, package a hypothesis into a prototype, and bring the solution to production together with engineers.
home.strengths.title: What your team gets
home.strengths.description: Not just polished screens, but a managed process from framing the problem to implementing the interface in the product.
home.strengths.strategy.title: Product clarity
home.strengths.strategy.text: I define segments, scenarios, JTBD, success metrics, and priorities — so design solves a business problem instead of decorating the backlog.
home.strengths.systems.title: Scalable UI
home.strengths.systems.text: I design components, states, empty/error/loading flows, and rules that survive product growth and reduce engineering overhead.
home.strengths.ai.title: AI-native experience
home.strengths.ai.text: I design trust, control, explainability, review loops, and human-in-the-loop scenarios for products powered by generative AI.
home.outcomes.title: Ways of working
home.outcomes.description: I can join at the early hypothesis stage or help a product that has already accumulated interface debt.
home.outcomes.discovery: Quickly unpack the domain: interviews, scenario maps, problem areas, and a product narrative.
home.outcomes.prototypes: Create clickable prototypes and specs that can be discussed with users and engineers.
home.outcomes.designSystem: Strengthen the design system: tokens, components, patterns, documentation, and a UX quality bar.
home.outcomes.launch: Support launch: edge cases, responsiveness, copy, handoff, and iterations after feedback.
home.proof.title: Why this matters in 2026
home.proof.description: Teams win not by producing more screens, but by learning faster, making better decisions, and earning user trust in automation.
home.proof.infrastructure.title: Infrastructure experience
home.proof.infrastructure.text: I work with products that have many roles, permissions, states, technical constraints, and expensive mistakes — so I design systemically.
home.proof.developers.title: Developer empathy
home.proof.developers.text: I design tools for professional users where speed, predictability, transparency, and respect for their workflow matter most.
home.proof.ai.title: AI as part of the process
home.proof.ai.text: I use AI for research, variation, and prototyping, while keeping the final decision grounded in product logic and real user needs.
home.finalCta.title: Have a complex product interface? Let’s make it simpler and stronger.
home.finalCta.text: Reach out if you need a design partner for B2B, AI, developer tools, or internal platforms. I can quickly unpack the challenge and show the next step.
home.social.label: Social links
